title: David Hulme (rugby league)
description: GB international rugby league footballer and coach (born 1964)
extract: David Hulme (born 6 February 1964) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 1980s and 1990s. He played at representative level for Great Britain, and at club level for Widnes, the Leeds Rhinos and the Salford City Reds, as a stand-off, or scrum-half.
